channel.title: INfood
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INfood, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: One-Pan Irish Chicken
item.description: This Irish chicken is my cozy mashup of pub vibes and weeknight reality. Seared chicken thighs baked over bacon, cabbage,…

item.title: Crack Chicken Orzo
item.description: This crack chicken orzo bake is creamy, cheesy, and packed with that irresistible ranch, bacon, and cheddar “crack” flavor everyone…

item.title: Cheddar Bay Biscuit Bread
item.description: If you love my Red Lobster Cheddar Bay Biscuits, this Cheddar Bay Biscuit Bread has the same buttery, garlicky cheddar…

item.title: Bang Bang Shrimp Pasta
item.description: Bang bang shrimp pasta is what weeknight dinner dreams are made of! Juicy shrimp, tender pasta, and that irresistible sweet-and-spicy…

item.title: Copycat Starbucks Pink Drink
item.description: You guys, Starbucks sells the Strawberry Açaí concentrate in stores! Which means we can make the famous Starbuck’s Pink Drink…

item.title: Fudgy Chocolate Tahini Cookies (1 Bowl!)
item.description: While recently making our tahini cookies for what felt like the millionth time, we thought, Why not add chocolate to this party? The result was even b...

item.title: Vegan Gluten-Free Morning Glory Muffins
item.description: Say hello to morning glory muffins, made vegan + gluten-free ! A classic treat originally created by Pam McKinstry in 1978 at her Nantucket restaurant...

item.title: Creamy Curried Black Eyed Pea Soup
item.description: What’s that? You’d like an easy, delicious soup that practically makes itself and will make all of your wildest dreams come true!? Us too ! We can’t g...

item.title: Tahini Hot Chocolate (Super Dreamy, Protein-Rich!)
item.description: If you’re looking for a decadent, elevated hot chocolate with wholesome ingredients, this one’s for you! We’ve been serving up this frothy, tahini-inf...
